data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually attractive design that promotes usability.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive design language with a minimalist approach.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reducing decision time by simplifying choices.
data.technical_spec: Clear categorization and minimal clutter on UI.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.technical_spec: Larger clickable elements for faster access.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Visual hierarchy that aids in quick perception.
data.technical_spec: Grouping related elements to enhance UI comprehension.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements placed close together perceived as related.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of UI components for better UX.
